payload.title: Per-principal + per-tenant rate limiting middleware
payload.description: Add a token-bucket limiter keyed on the authenticated principal (auth.sub) and a sliding-window per-tenant aggregate ceiling, mounted after authMiddleware in src/server.js and before workspace resolution. Reuse the {allowed, retryAfterMs} + 429/Retry-After shape from src/pair.js. Fail closed. Depends on SCP-122 for the claim shape. (From SCP-127.)
